svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #E2E4E6;
display: inline-block; font-size: 30px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#E2E4E6, #282a2c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(26, 33, 34), rgb(205, 211, 212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(128, 213, 203), rgb(13, 86, 77));
